rules.rule: kernel/ is Layer 0 — it must not import from any other src/ module (core/, topology/, operations/, etc.). Only external dependencies and local kernel/ files are allowed.
OCCT Emscripten returns enum objects with .value property. Always extract with: typeof val === 'number' ? val : Number(val?.value ?? val). Never assume enums are raw numbers.
initFromOC(oc) must be called before any kernel operation. Kernel methods should not assume initialization. New kernel adapter methods must be added to the KernelAdapter interface in kernel/types.ts.
WASM-allocated objects must be cleaned up in try-finally blocks. Use const_cast copy constructor for ownership transfer in C++ extractors. Two-pass pre-allocation pattern for C++ extractors.
Always convert Uint32Array to regular Array before passing to kernel methods. WASM interop does not handle typed arrays correctly in all cases.
